/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/gcc  -D_LANGUAGE_C   -O0 -g -D_DEBUG  -Wl,--export-dynamic CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldgram.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldlex.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/lexsup.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldlang.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/mri.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldctor.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldwrite.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldexp.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldemul.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldver.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldmisc.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldfile.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldcref.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ldmain.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf_x86_64.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf_i386.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/ei386linux.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf32btsmip.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf32btsmipn32.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf32ltsmip.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf32ltsmipn32.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf64btsmip.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf64ltsmip.c.o CMakeFiles/ld.dir/eelf_x86_64_fbsd.c.o  -o ../../../bin/ipa_link -rdynamic ../../../lib/libbfd.a ../../../GCC/gcc/libiberty.a -ldl
